---
title: Events
page-navigation: false

listing:
  - id: upcoming-events
    template: upcoming-events-template.ejs
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    categories: unnumbered
  - id: year_2026
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2026
  - id: year_2025
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2025
  - id: year_2024
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2024
  - id: year_2023
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2023
  - id: year_2022
    contents: events/
    sort: "date desc"
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2022
  - id: year_2021
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2021
  - id: year_2020
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2020
  - id: year_2019
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2019
  - id: year_2018
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2018 
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-expand: 3
toc-location: left
page-layout: full #right 
repo-actions: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="/assets/javascript/clear_filter_button.js" defer></script>
      <script src="/assets/bootstrap-5.3.8-dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js" defer></script>
---



```{=html}

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const tooltipTriggerList = document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]')
  const tooltipList = [...tooltipTriggerList].map(tooltipTriggerEl => new bootstrap.Tooltip(tooltipTriggerEl))
})
</script>

<style>
.card-header a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--osc-green);
}

.card-header a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.card-text-clamp {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 4;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.card-title-clamp {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  overflow: hidden;
}



.trainingurl{
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
  margin: 0.2em 0 0.3em 0;
  border: 1px var(--osc-accent-secondary);
  width: fit-content;
  padding: 0 0.30em;
  border-radius: 5px;
  background:rgba(166, 200, 113,0.8);
  color: white;
}

.trainingurl a {
  color: #000000;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.card:hover .trainingurl{
  color:var(--osc-accent);
}

</style>



```




## Upcoming Events

::: {#upcoming-events}
:::


## Past Events

### 2026
::: {#year_2026}
:::


### 2025

::: {#year_2025}
:::

### 2024

::: {#year_2024}
:::

### 2023

::: {#year_2023}
:::

### 2022

::: {#year_2022}
:::

### 2021
::: {#year_2021}
:::

### 2020
::: {#year_2020}
:::

### 2019
::: {#year_2019}
:::

### 2018
::: {#year_2018}
:::
